description: Expand seed script to 1000+ anime, integrate full filler dataset from GitHub API, fetch episode titles from Jikan, and create a Vercel Cron sync route for weekly re-seeding.
steps: Update scripts/seed.ts: Change totalPages from 4 to 20 (20 pages x 50 = 1000 anime). Add better progress logging and error recovery (retry failed pages up to 3 times).

Update src/lib/filler-data.ts: Enhance fetchFillerDataFromGitHub() to actually parse the GitHub repo data. The function already exists but may not properly handle the API response format. Add a fallback to fetch from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xsunzukz/anime-filler-episodes-api/main/data.json. Keep the local FILLER_DATABASE as final fallback.
Update scripts/seed.ts seedFillerData function: Call fetchFillerDataFromGitHub() instead of getAllFillerData() so it fetches the full remote dataset rather than just the 10 hardcoded entries.

Add a new function to scripts/seed.ts: seedEpisodeTitles() that iterates through all anime with malId set, fetches episode data from Jikan API (GET /anime/{id}/episodes), and updates Episode records with titles. Respect Jikan rate limits (350ms between requests). Process in batches with progress logging.

Create src/app/api/cron/sync/route.ts: A GET route handler that performs an incremental sync - fetches the first 5 pages from AniList (currently airing + recently updated), upserts anime records, updates filler data, and updates episode titles for new entries. Include a CRON_SECRET env var check for security (compare against Authorization header).
Update vercel.json to add cron configuration: { "crons": [{ "path": "/api/cron/sync", "schedule": "0 3 * * 0" }] } (weekly on Sunday at 3am UTC).
Add rate limiting helpers: create src/lib/rate-limiter.ts with a simple async sleep utility and a request queue that respects per-second limits for both AniList and Jikan APIs.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/seed.ts fetches 20 pages (1000+ anime) from AniList
Filler data is fetched from the GitHub repository API rather than only using hardcoded local data
Episode titles are fetched from Jikan API and stored in Episode.title field
src/app/api/cron/sync/route.ts exists and performs incremental sync
CRON_SECRET is checked in the sync route for security
The build still succeeds (the cron route compiles correctly)
verification: Run 'npm run build' to confirm all new routes and updated scripts compile without errors
Run 'npm run lint' to check for TypeScript errors
findings: All new files compile and build cleanly. Pre-existing lint errors in SearchBar.tsx (react-hooks/set-state-in-effect) and unused AnimeCard import in anime-like page remain from before this feature. The cron route appears as a dynamic route (f) in the build output. Seed script TypeScript compiles cleanly with tsc --noEmit.
